AIDA.name: Attention-Interest-Desire-Action
stages: Attention: Hook with a bold statement or question
Interest: Present the problem and why it matters
Desire: Show the solution and its benefits
Action: Clear call-to-action

PAS.name: Problem-Agitate-Solution
stages: Problem: Identify the reader's pain point
Agitate: Amplify the problem and its consequences
Solution: Present your product/service as the answer

BAB.name: Before-After-Bridge
stages: Before: Describe the current situation/problem
After: Paint the picture of life after the solution
Bridge: Show how your product/service gets them there

FAB.name: Features-Advantages-Benefits
stages: Features: List what the product does
Advantages: Explain why each feature matters
Benefits: Describe the real-world impact for the user

PASTOR.name: Problem-Amplify-Story-Transformation-Offer-Response
stages: Problem: Identify the reader's problem
Amplify: Make the consequences vivid
Story: Share a relatable narrative
Transformation: Show the change
Offer: Present your solution
Response: Ask for action

4Ps.name: Promise-Picture-Proof-Push
stages: Promise: Make a compelling promise
Picture: Help them visualize the outcome
Proof: Provide evidence and social proof
Push: Give them a reason to act now

QUEST.name: Qualify-Understand-Educate-Stimulate-Transition
stages: Qualify: Identify your target audience
Understand: Show empathy for their situation
Educate: Teach them something valuable
Stimulate: Create excitement
Transition: Guide to the next step

SSS.name: Star-Story-Solution
stages: Star: Introduce the main character (customer/product)
Story: Tell the journey with challenges
Solution: Reveal the happy ending with your product
